# Lantern

## Description

- Start each combat with an additional 1 Energy.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong with high-impact opening hands; stacks well with other start-of-combat energy relics.
- Especially strong with X-cost openers like Whirlwind+, turning multi-enemy hallway fights into one-card kills.
